title: [codereview-pass1] LR1110.cs thread safety
description: After first chunk (locks in Reset/Finish/Sim* properties): Transmit(), HandleOpcode(), TriggerTx(), SendRxEnter() still access state/opcode without stateLock in many places. Missing using System.Threading; readerThread not started. GNSS stubs incomplete for T1000-E integration. File as codereview. Depends on project-LICHEN-r7h4.12
close_reason: Fixed thread safety with consistent stateLock on all rxMode/irqFlags accesses, added reader thread pattern from SX1262, removed blocking WaitForRxResponse. 3 codereview passes with no P0-P2 findings.
